verificationNote: AI-generated indicative evidence items for SOC 2. Organizations should adapt to their system description and auditor expectations.

evidence.name: Code of Conduct
evidence.description: Documented code of conduct signed by all personnel

evidence.name: Board Meeting Minutes
evidence.description: Board/audit committee minutes evidencing oversight of internal controls

evidence.name: Training Completion Records
evidence.description: Security awareness and role-based training records

evidence.name: Risk Assessment Report
evidence.description: Annual risk assessment documenting threats, vulnerabilities, and treatment decisions

evidence.name: Control Monitoring Reports
evidence.description: Continuous monitoring and periodic evaluation reports of control effectiveness

evidence.name: ITGC Test Results
evidence.description: IT General Controls testing results covering access, change, and operations

evidence.name: Access Control Policy
evidence.description: Documented logical access control policy and procedures

evidence.name: User Provisioning Records
evidence.description: Records of user account creation, authorization, and approval

evidence.name: Access Review Reports
evidence.description: Quarterly user access recertification reports

evidence.name: Firewall and IDS/IPS Logs
evidence.description: Network security device logs and rule review records

evidence.name: Encryption Standards Document
evidence.description: Data-in-transit and data-at-rest encryption configuration evidence

evidence.name: SIEM Alert Reports
evidence.description: Security monitoring alert logs and investigation records

evidence.name: Incident Response Records
evidence.description: Incident tickets, response timeline, and post-incident reviews

evidence.name: Change Management Records
evidence.description: Change requests, testing evidence, approvals, and post-implementation reviews

evidence.name: BCP/DRP Documentation
evidence.description: Business continuity and disaster recovery plans with test results

evidence.name: Vendor Assessment Records
evidence.description: Vendor due diligence assessments and ongoing monitoring records

evidence.name: Capacity Monitoring Reports
evidence.description: System capacity utilization reports and scaling decisions

evidence.name: DR Test Results
evidence.description: Disaster recovery test execution reports with RTO/RPO validation

evidence.name: Processing Validation Records
evidence.description: Input validation, processing accuracy, and output reconciliation evidence

evidence.name: Data Classification Register
evidence.description: Inventory of confidential information with classification and protection controls

evidence.name: Privacy Notice
evidence.description: Published privacy notice/policy accessible to data subjects

evidence.name: Consent Records
evidence.description: Records of data subject consent for personal information processing
